_README: Secrets MUST NOT be committed here. All credential values are intentionally empty — set them as Railway env vars (using ASP.NET Core's '__' nesting convention, e.g. Jwt__Key) or via a gitignored appsettings.Local.json for local dev. See SECRETS.md.

ConnectionStrings._README: Local dev default — assumes the docker-compose.yml at repo root is running (`docker compose up -d`). Production overrides this entirely via the DATABASE_URL Railway env var; this value is never read in prod. Override locally via appsettings.Local.json if you run Postgres on a different host/port.
